case_title: VICTOR MANUEL PIXTUM VS. CHARLES PETE MONTANO

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PIXTUM, VICTOR MANUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTANO, CHARLES PETE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA GOLD COAST BUILDERS $8,391.22 PRINCIPAL, $41.72 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,657.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
